emails.rawMessage:
From: Cyrus Team <admin@example.com>
To: user1@example.com
Subject: Welcome to the Cyrus Test Server
Date: Mon, 01 Jan 2024 09:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <welcome-1@cyrus-docker-test-server>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

Welcome to the Cyrus Test Server!

This is a test instance of the Cyrus IMAP server, configured for
development and testing purposes.

Quick facts:
  - Any password is accepted (fakesaslauthd is running)
  - Default users: user1 through user5
  - Admin account: admin / admin
  - All services are pre-configured and running

Services available:
  - IMAP    port 8143
  - POP3    port 8110
  - JMAP    port 8080
  - CalDAV  port 8080
  - CardDAV port 8080
  - Sieve   port 4190

Enjoy testing!

-- The Cyrus Team

From: Cyrus Team <admin@example.com>
To: user1@example.com
Subject: How to use this server
Date: Mon, 01 Jan 2024 09:01:00 +0000
Message-ID: <welcome-2@cyrus-docker-test-server>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

How to use the Cyrus Test Server
=================================

IMAP access:
  telnet localhost 8143
  a LOGIN user1 anypassword
  a LIST "" "*"
  a SELECT INBOX
  a FETCH 1 (ENVELOPE)
  a LOGOUT

JMAP access:
  curl -u user1:x -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d '{"methodCalls":[["Mailbox/get",{},"1"]],"using":["urn:ietf:params:jmap:core","urn:ietf:params:jmap:mail"]}' \
    http://localhost:8080/jmap/

CalDAV / CardDAV:
  curl -u user1:x http://localhost:8080/dav/principals/user/user1/

Management Web UI:
  Open http://localhost:8001/ in your browser.
  - View users, create/delete accounts
  - Export user data as JSON
  - Import JSON to seed accounts

API:
  curl http://localhost:8001/api/user1 | jq .
  curl -T examples/empty.json http://localhost:8001/api/newuser
  curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8001/api/newuser

For more information, see the README.md in the source repository:
  https://github.com/cyrusimap/cyrus-docker-test-server
